Italian Kitchen · Steenberg, Cape Town

Wood-fired pizza, homemade pasta and family warmth — seven days a week in the heart of Steenberg.

Our Story

New name.
Same family. Same fire.

Formerly Basil & Co, now Mangiamo. A new chapter with the same heart, wood-fired pizzas, homemade pastas, and the simple joy of sharing a meal together.

The flavours you know and love aren't going anywhere. We're still serving generous plates, warm moments, and a place where everyone belongs.

From the Kitchen

What we're known for

Never shy on toppings, never rushed on sauce.

Wood-Fired Pizza

30cm bases, generous toppings, classics done right.

View pizzas →

Fresh Pasta

Lasagne, tagliatelle and rich, slow-simmered sauces.

View pastas →

Fillet & Seafood

Tender cuts, perfectly cooked meats, and fresh seafood favourites.

View the grill →

Dolci

Sweet endings worth saving room for. From classic tiramisu to warm apple crumble and homemade favourites.

View dolci →

From the Kitchen

The menu.

Everything made the slow way, served the warm way. Gluten-free and banting options available — and always ask about the chef's specialties on the board.

Wood-Fired Pizzas

Gluten-free (26cm) or banting (22cm) bases available, additional R39. Build your own or add toppings to any pizza — ask your waiter for the full list. We also make pizza bases for your home.

Menu items may contain or come into contact with wheat, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, soy, fish & milk — please ask for more information should you have any allergy concerns. All items are subject to availability. A discretionary service charge of 12% is added to tables of 6 people or more. Alcohol may not be sold to persons under the age of 18. Right of admission reserved.
